brand_identity: Professional Government Infrastructure Presentation. Restrained, authoritative, premium ($100M-scale proposal).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B3B24] text-white hover:bg-[#0B3B24]/90 px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0B3B24] text-[#0B3B24] hover:bg-[#0B3B24]/5 px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-medium transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/90 px-8 py-4 rounded-none font-semibold transition-all

components.navigation: Sticky top header (z-50) using glassmorphism (bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl). Must include smooth-scroll anchor links to the 16 sections.

charts.style: Authoritative Bloomberg-terminal-meets-government-whitepaper. Sharp lines, solid geometric fills, no curves (monotone or linear interpolation).
charts.guidance: Use strokeWidth={2}, clean CartesianGrid (strokeDasharray='3 3', vertical={false}). Tooltips must have sharp square corners and charcoal borders.

maps.style: Minimalist geometric vector strokes. Deep green paths, gold nodes for hubs. NO Mapbox or Google Maps APIs.

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for sharp corners (rounded-none). Inputs should have solid charcoal/20 borders, focus:ring-[#0B3B24].

sections_guidance.hero: Cinematic full viewport height. Use masterplan_bg or hero_landscape with a bg-black/40 overlay. Huge Cabinet Grotesk typography.
sections_guidance.challenges: Grid of stat counters showing demographic/regional stats.
sections_guidance.masterplan: Bento-box grid revealing 6 precincts (Community, Accommodation, Transport, Commercial, Event, Emergency). Hover states reveal data.
sections_guidance.flow_diagram: Horizontal step-cards or connected SVG flow connecting Council ↔ Cassowary ↔ Community.
sections_guidance.revenue_model: Interactive dashboard with 3 toggle buttons (Conservative, Moderate, Optimistic) that mutate state and update the Recharts below.
sections_guidance.roadmap: Vertical or horizontal timeline using strict geometric nodes, mapping 6 implementation phases.
sections_guidance.cta: Final dark section (bg-primary) with form integrations mapped to MongoDB.

logistics_freight.description: White semi-truck on highway for transport precinct

community_park.description: Aerial park view for community section

infrastructure_render.description: Modern structural building for commercial precinct

emergency_response.description: EMT professionals for emergency response capability

testing_attributes: All interactive elements (tabs, toggles, buttons, chart filters, forms) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Do NOT use placeholder images; rely exclusively on the image_urls provided. 2. Build all 16 sections natively on one long-scroll page using Tailwind. 3. Strip all border-radius (rounded-none) and soft drop-shadows from Shadcn components to maintain the rigid, premium architectural government aesthetic. 4. Use Lucide-react for iconography. 5. Ensure responsive spacing is extremely generous (p-12 to p-24) on desktop to feel expensive.
